hypotheses.title: Mn-OP Complexes as Non-Enzymatic Neuroprotective Antioxidants
key_issues: Concentration scaling from in vitro to brain

hypotheses.title: Mn Speciation x alpha-Synuclein Aggregation
key_issues: NAC domain dominance over C-terminal metal binding

hypotheses.title: Endogenous CSF Mn-OP Pool
hypotheses.kill_reason: CSF Mn concentration ~1-3 nM is 1000x too low for Mn-OP complex formation (requires uM range)

critic_questions: What is the Kd of DP1 for Mn2+? Does Mn-OP form at 1-10 uM Mn?
Has anyone measured SLC30A10 substrate specificity for free vs complexed Mn?
Does Mn-OP enter microglia through the same transporters as free Mn2+?
What Mn-binding ligands should be in the PHREEQC speciation model?
Has Mn-OP activity been measured in mitochondria-like conditions (pH 7.8, high phosphate)?
